narrative:
Cortland City C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 892 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
